name: Reverse Translate AA to DNA
description: Converts an amino acid sequence into a codon-optimized DNA sequence for a target host and saves it as a GenBank file.

inputs.name: aa_sequence
inputs.description: The raw amino acid sequence to be converted.

inputs.name: host
inputs.description: The target organism for codon optimization (e.g., 'e_coli', 's_albus'). Defaults to 'e_coli'.

inputs.name: filename
inputs.description: The desired name for the output GenBank file. Must end in .gb.

outputs.description: A dictionary containing the optimized DNA string and the file path where the GenBank file was saved.
